generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired teacher, I've always valued safety and order. The new domestic security measures might seem strict, but they're what responsible adults need to protect our communities. Remember when we had those incidents at schools? This ensures we're prepared without overreacting. It's our duty to support law enforcement with the tools they need. #CommunitySafetyFirst #SupportOurOfficers
